purpose: Research metadata for 30 real products from each of 20 fashion labels. This file is not a license grant.

validation_summary.note: Every image URL resolved as image content. Vetements uses an explicitly labeled SSENSE retailer fallback; Balenciaga and Stone Island official product pages were browser-verified because raw HTTP requests were blocked by anti-bot controls.
validation_summary.runtime_image_mode: source-hosted local-prototype preview; production clearance required

rights_policy.note: The local hackathon prototype loads source-hosted product images for research review. This manifest does not grant display or hotlink rights. Before public or production use, obtain permission or replace every image with a licensed or project-owned asset.
